limitations: The tracked trace file preserves the route evidence for the three-branch Claude Code smoke, but the matching last_routing.json from that run is not preserved as a tracked repo artifact.
Secret-bearing statusline, routing-history, and trace outputs remain operator-captured evidence surfaces rather than tracked artifacts.
The surviving /tmp trace file is for the later Azure direct-endpoint compatibility validation, not the earlier full three-branch smoke bundle.

landed_commits.summary: SEAM-2: deliver smoke procedure and evidence manifest
SEAM-2: align closeout and thread publication state
Resolve Azure endpoint env vars and normalize chat URL

runtime_anchors.proof: publishes the operator procedure, required evidence surfaces, and the normal / think / tool-loop continuation branch set
routes plan-mode tool-result continuations back to the default execution path before think routing
writes routing history, injects continuation reminders for tool-result follow-ups, and classifies/redacts operator-facing failures

operator_run_evidence.source: tracked trace file plus session summary provided in the current thread
operator_run_evidence.gateway_path: real substrate-gateway binary via public /v1/messages ingress
operator_run_evidence.provider_posture: live provider through a temporary OpenAI-backed mapping; the path remained Claude Code -> gateway -> live provider

statusline.observed: rendered routing history during the run

cases.trace_evidence: docs/kimi-claude-live-smoke-trace.jsonl line 5 recorded the initial think request and line 6 recorded the follow-up default request containing assistant tool_use, user tool_result, and the injected continuation reminder

operator_run_evidence.cleanup: the gateway was shut back down and the temp repo-local config used for the run was removed
notes: docs/kimi-claude-live-smoke-trace.jsonl also contains earlier exploratory route checks on lines 1 through 4, but lines 5 through 8 are the authoritative SEAM-2 proof bundle
the current /Users/spensermcconnell/.substrate-gateway/last_routing.json has been overwritten by later test activity and is therefore not used as the primary artifact for this smoke

operator_run_evidence.source: surviving local artifacts plus the session transcript provided by the user in the current thread
operator_run_evidence.purpose: prove that base_url = "$AZURE_KIMI_ENDPOINT" works when the env var contains a full .../openai/v1/chat/completions URL
notes: the surviving trace file contains a real Claude prompt requesting DIRECT_ENDPOINT_OK only
the trace recorded provider azure-kimi-live and route_type default for model Kimi-K2.5
the current last_routing.json was later overwritten by tests and therefore is only partial supporting evidence for this run

cases.request_shape: single user text turn without thinking
assertions: the first captured provider request uses model kimi-k2-actual
the first captured provider request keeps thinking unset

cases.request_shape: single user text turn with thinking enabled
assertions: the second captured provider request uses model kimi-k2-thinking-actual
the second captured provider request preserves thinking

cases.request_shape: plan-mode follow-up containing only tool results
assertions: the third captured provider request uses model kimi-k2-actual instead of the think model
the third captured provider request preserves thinking while remaining on the default execution route
the last user message is converted to blocks and prepended with the internal continuation reminder

coverage: public error messages for auth, url, deployment, and transport drift
route failure classification remains distinct from transport failures
